name: Fix AI Photo Coach bugs and tech debt

asi.hypothesis: Establish baseline test count before fixing CONCERNS.md issues

description: Fix manual shutter in Pet/Kids burst mode - use autoCaptureTrigger for proper burst sequencing

asi.hypothesis: Manual shutter in burst mode was calling capturePhoto(0) once instead of triggering full burst sequence
asi.fix: Use autoCaptureTrigger() in burst mode to properly sequence burst shots

description: Fix hardcoded stability value - use actual stabilityScore from useStability hook

asi.hypothesis: CameraScreen was passing hardcoded 0.01 as stability value instead of using actual sensor data
asi.fix: Destructure stabilityScore from useStability and pass to useScoring
